summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: ms_vocab_richness_mean_scale_var (r=+0.56), moment_impact_score (r=-0.54), thumb_sharpness (r=-0.45). Top predictors of retention_30s: traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.70), ms_surprise_density_scale_var (r=+0.59). Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: shareability_score (r=-0.67), moment_impact_score (r=-0.60), ms_scale_agreement (r=-0.54). Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: traffic_search_pct (r=+0.75), moment_impact_score (r=-0.69), shareability_score (r=-0.67). Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: shareability_score (r=-0.67), moment_impact_score (r=-0.63), traffic_search_pct (r=+0.57). Top predictors of outlier_potential: thumb_brightness (r=-0.57), thumb_sharpness (r=-0.57), geo_latam_pct (r=+0.56). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: thumb_brightness (r=-0.69), traffic_subscriber_pct (r=-0.64), geo_asia_pct (r=+0.63).
